title: narcissus jonquilla f. henriquesii
intro: Narcissus jonquilla f. henriquesii, also known as Henriques' jonquil, is a fragrant and delicate bulbous perennial plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant's flowers are highly prized for their medicinal properties, which include their potential to be used as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, due to the presence of alkaloids like galantamine and lycorine. The health benefits of Narcissus jonquilla f. henriquesii include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to exhibit neuroprotective properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs and flowers can be used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions, although caution should be exercised due to the plant's toxic alkaloids.
